title: Protesters waving flags and shouting with their right arms raised
description: The student protesters honoured thousands of those killed when nationwide mass protests were put down last month.

title: Donald Trump speaks
description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.

title: A heavily damaged vehicle with warped metal is surrounded by rubble from what appears to be a destroyed building behind it. A man is standing in the distance.
description: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

title: Venezuelan Interim President Delcy Rodríguez and her brother National Assembly President Jorge Rodríguez
description: The announcement by the head of Venezuela's National Assembly comes amid US pressure following the capture of ex-President Nicolás Maduro.

title: Russian rescuers work at the scene after a tour bus with Chinese tourists plunged under the ice of Lake Baikal. Photo: 20 February 2026
description: A Russian driver also died when their mini-bus plunged under the ice to the bottom of the lake in Siberia.

title: A tortoise with genes of the Floreana Island giant tortoise species eats in a breeding centre at the Galapagos National Park
description: The native species was driven to extinction by sailors in the 1800s. Now, 158 juvenile giant tortoises have been reintroduced to the island.

title: The yellow and green Hezbollah flag flies in the breeze, against a clear blue sky.
description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.

title: A woman dressed entirely in black is held by another, clutching her hands to chest and her mouth open in a wail.
description: Nasrallah Abu Siyam was the sixth American citizen killed by Israeli settlers or soldiers in the West Bank in the last two years.

title: Orange and white Artemis rocket next to a towering grey space system and a blue, white, and red starts and stripes flag, against a blue sky
description: The mission to the far side of the Moon and back will be postponed after problems with were spotted with its rocket, a Nasa official said.

title: A  young man called Quentin Deranque sits outside
description: Far-left militants are suspected of being behind Quentin Deranque's death and the party of Jean-Luc Mélenchon is being widely condemned.

title: Nisha Vaishnav, who has cropped hair, is dressed in a yellow football shirt looking away from the camera
description: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.

title: A crane lifts red and blue shipping containers from vessel
description: The Supreme Court's decision has led questions over whether people can get a refund over the unlawful tariffs.

title: Donald Trump gesturing behind a lectern while wearing a blue suit jacket, white shirt and red cap with "MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN" written across the front in large white letters.
description: Just a year into Trump's second term, and about half of Project 2025's policies have been implemented, observers say.

title: Lim Young-woong gestures a heart shape with both of his arms raised above his head
description: The traditional South Korean popular music genre is making headlines in the country once again.

title: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas waves, with a Palestinian flag and a guard in the background
description: More than 30 years after its creation, there are increasing warnings that the PA is close to collapse.

title: Donald Trump is talking to the press.
description: Bernd Debusmann describes how the president reacted after his sweeping levies were struck down.

title: A giant tortoise being released on the Galápagos island of Floreana
description: One hundred and fifty eight captive-bred juvenile tortoises were released on the Galápagos island of Floreana.

title: Splitscreen. Left, Andrew. Right, Sarah Smith.
description: Sarah Smith explains why so far, no Americans, beyond Epstein and Maxwell, have faced criminal investigations.

title: A composite image, left shows police outside Andrew's residence, right is an archived photo of Andrew
description: The former prince spent the day at a police station in Norfolk, before being released under investigation.

title: People in car full of oranges throw them at the crowd
description: A town in northern Italy has started celebrating carnival with its annual Battle of the Oranges where people hurl the fruit at each other for fun.

title: US President Donald Trump addresses a press conference about the Supreme Court's striking down of most of his tariffs in the briefing room at the White House in Washington, DC, USA, 20 February 2026
description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.

title: A heavily damaged vehicle with warped metal is surrounded by rubble from what appears to be a destroyed building behind it. A man is standing in the distance.

title: A series of wooden structures in a curved line are protruding out of the sand. Water covers some of the beach.
description: Strong winds have revealed what some locals believe to be the remains of HMS Saldanha, which sank in 1811.

title: The top of Castle Peak, site of a deadly avalanche in the Sierra Nevada mountains near Soda Springs, California, on 21 February 2026.
description: Authorities released the names of the six women and three guides who died in the worst avalanche in state history.

title: Dublin's Cope Street, which has a blue building on the left and a brown building with pink shutters on the right.
description: The men, aged in their 20s and 30s, are due to appear in court on Monday.
